scope: Discord automated acceptance evidence across naia-shell and naia-agent
resolved_findings: Replaced a structurally vacuous inbox assertion with two-channel Playwright coverage that returns to Chat and rejects every Discord fixture body from the private transcript.
Added a ChatArea unit test that injects a discord_message chunk and proves both private message state and streaming content remain unchanged.

Wrapped the production native binding-save transaction in a generation gate and proved present-empty and absent conflicts execute zero discovery, write, or restart effects while preserving file state.
Added overlapping provider turns on two bindings, completed them out of order, and proved reply routing plus follow-up history isolation.
Downgraded REQ-012 and UC-016 to In-progress and TEST-S-015 to Partial until the credentialed live acceptance matrix is executed.

automated_evidence.agent: 99 files passed, 3 skipped; 1225 tests passed, 9 skipped; TypeScript passed
automated_evidence.shell_ui: 117 files passed, 2 skipped; 1304 tests passed, 13 skipped
automated_evidence.shell_traceability: REQ 16, UC 12, TEST-S 14, SPEC 10, TEST-F 10; dead-link 0; orphan 0

verify_implementation.build: PASS for Shell package and Agent TypeScript
verify_implementation.i18n_and_hardcoded_strings: PASS for changed Discord production files; repository-wide pre-existing strings are outside this change

external_acceptance_pending: Live two-channel Discord receive/reply, RESUME/reconnect, dedupe replay, permission-loss/403, and token rotate/revoke.
